title: ixeridium dentatum var. nipponicum
intro: Ixeridium dentatum var. nipponicum, also known as Japanese saxifrage, is a perennial plant in the Saxifragaceae family native to East Asia. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and roots have been used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Ixeridium dentatum var. nipponicum have been reported to provide health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Asian medicine to treat various health conditions.
